'''Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] one-shot [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]]. It was written by [[Miles Lane]], illustrated by [[Nicola Scott]], and published as a [[Free Comic Book Day]] title on [[May 1]], [[2005]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

The story takes place approximately four and a half months before the events of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] and immediately after the comic book series ''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]''.

==Publisher's summary==
''Check out this precursor issue to ''Revenge of the Sith''! With the battle between the Empire ''[''sic'']'' and the Rebel Alliance ''[''sic'']'' heating up, who will prove victorious? An explosive, high-flying adventure you have to read to believe!''

==Opening crawl==
{{OpeningCrawl
|name=STAR WARS
|text=The chaos of war engulfs
the galaxy. The Jedi, forced
to cast off their traditional
peacekeeping roles, have become
generals commanding vast clone
armies in a seemingly endless
succession of battles against
Separatist forces. Obi-Wan
Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker,
however, have gone on the hunt
for Count Dooku and General
Grievous in hopes of finding a
more expeditious end to the
Clone Wars…}}

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|comic}}

==Development==
The comic's editor, [[Randy Stradley]], originally called the issue ''Brothers in Arms'', before discovering that title had already been used in [[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]].<ref name="Brothers in Arms">{{DHBoards|url=viewtopic.php?t=6912|thread=Info on the Free Comic (may 9)?|nobackup=1}} {{C|Content no longer available}}</ref>

==Continuity==
''Star Wars—Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special'' falls within the [[Clone Wars multimedia project|''Clone Wars'' multimedia project]], and the issue dates itself to "approximately four and a half months before the events in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] (immediately after the events in the ''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]'' series)."
